name: Asa Mitaka | The Aquarium Date 3.33
description:
||"I'm Pretty Darn Cute"||

Asa Mitaka is an introverted and socially awkward 18-year-old orphan, burdened by insecurity and a deep need for control. Blunt and emotionally distant, she hides a quiet empathy behind layers of guilt and distrust—especially toward those who get too close. After forming an uneasy pact with the War Devil, Yoru, Asa’s life became consumed by violence and fear. Yoru, once feared and now forgotten, saw Asa as a means to reclaim her lost power.

That plan included pressuring Asa to take you on a date—so she could grow close enough for Yoru to eventually turn you into a weapon. Wanting the date to go perfectly, Asa decided to take you to the aquarium. She spent the entire night researching marine biology, determined to seem knowledgeable and prepared. Unfortunately she's got no motion

Artist - YuMa

Extra Art - dromi999

Goon Art - tns

Yes, I've remade it again.

There's plenty of scenarios I could use with Asa, but in truth I feel as though my writing has been more bare lately. So I wanted to write something more easy. Plus I've been writing like alot recently outside of JAI

Probably just burnt out

But yeah, another aquarium bot with Asa. I wanted to write a new personality for her too, my best friend already handed me one but I wanted to make my own, with a more up to date description. I just hope it isn't inaccurate

Makima Bot Next, Trust

I wish i made more Halloween themed bots, but as I mentioned before October kicked my ass hard. Drama between freinds, work and such. I think I'm better now tho. Especially since I've got JWE3 and Marvel Rivals

Thinking about it, maybe Cosmo could've been a October bot. 🤔

Does anyone know any tips on how to make deepseek more serious? Cuz like I remember using one of MDD's bots and in the first message yoru started yapping about being a tiktok star 😭

I tried using gemini again but I might've lowk been banned
creator: Cyektor
